title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of improving public health and wellbeing systems, then decide which two would make the greatest difference.
options: Increasing funding for mental health services
Investing in preventive healthcare and health education
Reducing waiting times through technology and digital health tools
Making healthcare universally free at the point of access
Improving working conditions and salaries for healthcare professionals

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to healthcare and wellbeing systems. Discuss the following ways of improving public health and wellbeing systems, then decide which two would make the greatest difference. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would make the greatest difference..
